main.description: Get the current state of a member's permissioned repo within a space. Callable with either OAuth (for the authenticated user's own data) or a space-credential (for syncing services).

repo.description: The DID of the member whose repo state to retrieve.

commit.description: Signed commitment over the current repo state. Includes the LtHash digest (commit.hash) and the rev. Absent when the repo has never been written to.
